Fayguard Parrying Dagger  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 17
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Word of Pain (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: RNG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Fayguard Parrying Dagger
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 17
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Word of Pain (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: RNG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 03:18:55
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 52
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Howling Stones (Charasis)
NPC Name
the Crypt Keeper
The Golem Master

__DEL__1591763639154
Scholar
36 posts
I looted one of these yesterday (04/21/04) along with several other goodies from both named and un-named mobs in the zone (while on an outting with a couple of guildmates: 61 RNG - me - 60 NEC, and a 63 BRD).

I'll use it, too (with the Steel Hilted Flint Dagger I also got) because it's fast, and my piercing always seems to be just a few points from being maxed.

# Oct 17 2002 at 3:05 PM Rating: Decent
Wolfish
6 posts
Hmmm I kind of love this little toy in Kael, soloing or whenever I don't have an enchanter/bard with me. The range of the AE is very small and I have even used with a chanter is the tank is pulling away from the mezzed mobs. Just have to keep it in mind is all. Well worth keeping in a backpack at all times

RE: Dooh
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2002 at 2:51 AM Rating: Decent
Auldian
View User Forum
Scholar
93 posts
The proc is tight. It's also pretty low aggro, unlike a slow spell such as Earthcaller's proc.
If you have something better for your primary, then this may seem like a noobie weapon. Quite honestly though, it hits fast and hits pretty hard. I'm still using it quite a lot at 60, although I switch to a non-proc weapon when necessary.
____________________________
Grupp of The Combine - Druzzil
Broogan of Firiona Vie
Auldian of Druzzil Ro - Retired

Im a 47 ranger, I went into HS for the first time with a group of 60's in my guild. I picked this up after a few hours.
When we ported out i went to ec and sold some of the other drops, and ended up with a lupine dagger.
Insanity is all you can say about this teamed with a lupine and schw.

just felt like braggin sense im the only 47 ranger i know with this monster of a pigstick

▲ Page top
Does not drop anymore...or drop rate drastically nerfed
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2002 at 3:45 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250918598
View User Forum
Scholar
44 posts
I am sad to report that the Fayguard Parrying Dagger does not appear to drop anymore in HS Crypt keeper. I have camped and hunted in HS for the past few weeks (at least 2 patches before this posting being made). I have killed the crypt keeper 7 or 8 times (when he is up and not the ##$%^$# placeholders). I have gotten several Wildlord gauntlets (POS BL gloves but droppable and thus sellable) and at least 2 Siren Scale Enchanter Robes (good stats and resists). Where once every crypt keeper pop almost always had the dagger, there is none to be seen now. The POS BL gauntlets are the new common drop now for the crypt keeper.

Its inevitable really. Verant (or rather Abashi and later Absor) has stated that weapons delays below 20 (with respectable damage like our dagger here) are much too powerful to be placed on relatively easy mobs like the crypt keeper (think more of Yelinak or Vulaak). Gratz on all the Rangers that got theirs before it dissapeared from the crypt keepers loot table. If it still drops, I would think the drop probabilty is near nil now.
▲ Page top
RE: Does not drop anymore...or drop rate drastically nerfed
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2003 at 7:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759728929
View User Forum
80 posts
I've seen it twice off The Golem Master. I think Allakhazams loot list is wrong on this one. They're also missing the Elegant Mask of Light which drops in HS. Dropped off one of the named devourers, not The Crypt Feaster, but the other one. Sorry, I forgot his name. Check out the mask on magelo though, very nice upgrade for my 61 chanter.

Effect - Word of Pain from spdat
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2001 at 12:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248979491
10 posts
Word of Pain
Decrease Hit Points (HP) from 24 (L9) to 29 (L14)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Clr (L9)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Evocation
Allowable Targets: Point Blank AoE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Area Effect Range: 20 feet
Pushes Target Back: 1 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Magic + 25

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 47
Spell Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 2.10 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.50 seconds
Recast Delay: 9.0 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You are wracked by pain.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso writhes in pain.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 29 2001 at 2:34 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My word, what a stupid stupid weapon... if this was warrior usable it'd kick ***, but any high-level ranger using this literally has a sign on his back stating "I LIKE XP LOSS".
RE: Bleh
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2001 at 2:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749781810
9 posts
I don't know if the thought ever passed through ur hollow head but u know rangers CAN still solo post 50. Sure this may not be the best group weapon with enchants and all but in some raid situations like kael where they can't be mezed (and if you have a 1/2 decent puller you'll only get singles anyway) it's great. They gave rangers Jolt for a reason. It's not like they can't take a single mele round like enchanters. Doing be so quick to judge before you know the uses.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 13 2001 at 10:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) tanks a lot for the info man. and im a ranger. of course this weapon is ranger only. and i think that if i stay just at zoning, and do not go a step in the zone i should be ok to shout no? but i didnt know it needed a key damn how do we get it? if i can manage to go inside the zone and find a "safe" place to auction i should find a group that dont want it after all the proc always break ench mez so it suck. but your totally thre is absolutly no way to go from zone to north wing? even by foloing wall, hiding all being SUPER carefull? usually there is always a way. in the worst csase ill wait till a big group zone in and stay close to them. do you think that if im very determined it could be possible?
RE: tanks for the info
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2001 at 4:17 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592248143071
10 posts
Ok, listen you aren't going to get one of these on a lark. Trust me. Here's why:

A: The Crypt Keeper is one of the LAST mobs in the North Wing, and he's surrounded by 7 other mobs + his pet. That is IF he's up. Been there 5 times, only up once (today, got my dagger WOOT)

B: Unless you have a rogue to pick the lock to the North wing, you have to kill a "sperm" mob (bottomless feeder or devourer) to get a TALLOW MARKED CANDLE to open the door. They are level 45-49 in range.

C: The stuff on the way to the Crypt Keeper is just pure evil. The skele's are SK's and harm touch anywhere from 491 - 581 hp's. I took 4 of them at once today and took 2144 hp's damage in 2 seconds. Died b4 I knew what hit me.

So to sum it up. You are not going to get one of these daggers by just going into the zone and /auctioning around. My advice: Wait until you are of level and have explored the zone a bit with some experienced people. It'll save you alot of unneccesasry CR's.
▲ Page top
RE: tanks for the info
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2001 at 10:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965834769
45 posts

Can you say "Please send me to Spelling 101".
▲ Page top
Sheesh
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 9:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755834641
44 posts
FreeMagnus the weapon is No-Drop.

Second you need a key to get into this place.

Third hanging around in HS at level 31 is certain death. Beyond the 500 point HT's the MOBs will rip you a second ******.

Fourth - I have seen this thing drop and rot abotu 10 times. (No Ranger in Group). * IF * you do not travel with a party to go get it you won't survive the trip from zone in to North Wing (which is only place I have seen it drop) UNLESS you are a Rogue and even then your safety is not certain.

Five - Level up. Get your key. Bring 5 friends with keys and fight at zone in to get the hang of it.

▲ Page top
RE: Sheesh
QuoteReply

__DEL__1591772015958
84 posts
Well you're right on all of those, but he had a decent plan, hanging around the zone auctioning to LOOT one, but he'd get shredded by the mobs there....

Personally this is an awesome ranger piercer and if you can get down there to get it, great to up piercing skill, if you're in a ranger heavy guild you might have a chance to get this =)

Isn't word of pain a point blank AoE? I thought it would only effect those that are in melee range.
▲ Page top
RE: AoE
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2001 at 8:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1690157842670
View User Forum
Sage
814 posts
It is a Point Blank EXTREMELY short range AE spell. So all the others sayin you can nots use this, speakin as a ranger that haves used one in Seb, Kael, Howlin Stones... your wrong.

The range is only 20 EQ units from the ranger usin it. So do nots listen to any non cleric, this is a cleric only spell, or any non ranger, since this is ranger only dagger, tellin you this is a bad weapon.
▲ Page top
RE: AoE
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 4:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750246078
Scholar
312 posts
This dagger is for when you're pulling trains for AoE parties. Sure the AoE only does 29 damage all around, but did you notice the delay?

I'd recommend not using this unless you're in an AoE group, or you really want to die quickly and have a very angry enchanter wanting to kill you after you get rezzed.
